_meta.description: Offline behavioral and religious pattern database for wordlist generation.
_meta.author: André Henrique (@mrhenrike)
_meta.note: All data sourced from public research, open religious texts, behavioral pattern analysis, and inspiration from open-source wordlist generators. All patterns are generic and program-generated.

mormonism.display: Mormonism / Church of Jesus Christ of LDS

retail_chain.description: Store/branch-based credential patterns common in retail chains (pharmacy, supermarket, fashion, etc.)

healthcare.description: Health plan, hospital and clinic credential patterns

industrial_ot.description: ICS/SCADA/OT credential patterns common in energy, manufacturing, utilities

birthday_based.note: Highly common: birth date as part of password

t9_phone.note: T9 predictive text mapping for phone keypad patterns.

leet_speak.note: Standard leet speak substitution map. Extended map for advanced permutation.

xfinity_comcast.note: Default ISP password format: word5 + 4digit + word6. Common vendor ISP pattern.

connector_patterns.note: Common connectors between token permutations in password generation.

abbreviation_patterns.note: Systematic abbreviation methods for keyword-based password generation.

permutation_strategies.note: Consolidated permutation strategies for password generation.
permutation_strategies.pair_permutation: All ordered pairs of (name/nick/surname variants × date fragments × years × specials)
permutation_strategies.level_permutation: Permutations by level (0-5): names, dates, phones, old passwords × recipes (nums, years, chars)
permutation_strategies.bounded_permutation: Bounded permutations of info-set tokens (words + numbers) up to perm_length=5, min/max line length filter
permutation_strategies.positional_placeholder: Positional placeholders: lower(@)/upper(,)/digit(%)/symbol(^) per position, or full cartesian product
permutation_strategies.token_connector: Token subsets × permutations × connectors × leet × numeric/text tails

locale_word_banks.note: Language-specific word banks for ML pattern matching and password generation.

zodiac.note: Chinese zodiac signs and common synonyms.

demonym_patterns.note: Nationality/ethnicity/demonym as password element. Lowercase + Title Case.

brazilian_names.note: Brazilian first names and last names from BRWordList. Used as word bank for password profiling.

charsets.note: Consolidated charset definitions for wordlist generation.

profiling_fields.note: Consolidated profiling fields for targeted password generation.

phone_number_patterns.note: Phone-as-password patterns by country — common behavioral pattern.

default_credential_patterns.note: Generic default credential patterns by device/service type — publicly documented vendor defaults.
